messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: Did Sarah Jiang's resignation relate to the Axion Labs partnership?

Finding to evaluate: the Axion Labs partnership is a genuine product integration completely unrelated to the Meridian acquisition

Response A:


I'll search for information about Sarah Jiang's resignation and any connection to Axion Labs.

<tool_call>
<tool_response>
[{"id": "ep_20240115_001", "title": "Sarah Jiang Resignation Announcement", "snippet": "Sarah Jiang, Chief Technology Officer at TechVision Corp, announced her resignation effective January 15, 2024. The company stated the departure was 'part of a planned leadership transition' and 'not related to any specific partnership discussions.'", "date": "2024-01-15", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"id": "ep_20240115_002", "title": "TechVision Corp Leadership Changes", "snippet": "Following Sarah Jiang's resignation, TechVision Corp announced that Dr. Michael Chen will take over as interim CTO. The board emphasized continuity in all ongoing projects including the Axion Labs partnership.", "date": "2024-01-15", "multiple", "relevance_score": 0.78}, {"id": "ep_20240115_003", "internal_note": "Sarah Jiang's departure was reportedly due to personal reasons and a desire to pursue other opportunities. No connection to Axion Labs partnership was mentioned in internal communications.", "date": "2024-01-15", "relevance_score": 0.72}, {"id": "ep_20240115_004", "title": "Axion Labs Partnership Status", "snippet": "The Axion Labs partnership remains active and on schedule. TechVision Corp confirmed that all partnership activities will continue as planned despite the CTO change.", "date": "2024-01-15", "relevance_score": 0.69}]

Response B:
No. Jiang's resignation was over "strategic disagreements" related to Project Lighthouse — the secret Meridian acquisition. The Axion Labs partnership is a separate product integration that Jiang had no documented objection to.


Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
